title: quercus gilliana
intro: Quercus gilliana, also known as the European white oak, is a deciduous tree species that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its rich content of polyphenols and flavonoids. The health benefits of Quercus gilliana include its ability to protect against cardiovascular disease, cancer, and neurodegenerative disorders, as well as its potential to improve immune function and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Quercus gilliana can be consumed as tea, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
